description.short: Discover declarative agent samples from the pnp/copilot-pro-dev-samples repo.
description.full: A declarative agent that helps developers discover, understand, and adopt declarative agent samples from the pnp/copilot-pro-dev-samples repository. Search by capability or scenario, get cloning and adaptation guidance, and learn how to bootstrap your own sample. Uses unauthenticated GitHub REST API calls and scoped web search.
